title: Where is it stated officially that the FAR only sent out 7 seeds of life
display_title: Where is it stated officially that the FAR only sent out 7 seeds of life
wikitext:
[]: Where is it stated (officially) that the FAR only sent out 7 seeds of life?             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Fri Jun 09, 2023 2:47 pm It says so here but I can't find any official source or even references to an official source that states only 7 Seeds of Life were sent out by the FAR. https://wiki.evageeks.org/First_Ancestral_Race

[]: Re: Where is it stated (officially) that the FAR only sent out 7 seeds of life?             Quote Post by Blockio » Fri Jun 09, 2023 6:01 pm As per the article; "The information about them comes almost exclusively from their Classified Information Files and from Kaworu's 'good' PSP ending.", so it's gonna be in one of those two. These are both officially licensed material, I believe we have a translation of CI up on the wiki, if it's not in there, it would be in the PSP ending

[]: Re: Where is it stated (officially) that the FAR only sent out 7 seeds of life?             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Fri Jun 09, 2023 6:08 pm Yes, but this isn't mentioned on either page: They were the first extraterrestrial intelligence. The humanoid species, referred to as the First Ancestral Race, started to spread Seeds of Life throughout the Milky Way Galaxy. As of yet, we do not know their motives or for what they were aiming. It is becoming evident that multiple Seeds were disseminated. Eventually, by force of sheer bad luck, two accidentally landed on the same planet: Adam of the White Moon, and Lilith of the Black Moon.

[]: Re: Where is it stated (officially) that the FAR only sent out 7 seeds of life?             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Tue Jun 13, 2023 1:50 pm FelipeFritschF wrote: Yes, but this isn't mentioned on either page: They were the first extraterrestrial intelligence. The humanoid species, referred to as the First Ancestral Race, started to spread Seeds of Life throughout the Milky Way Galaxy. As of yet, we do not know their motives or for what they were aiming. It is becoming evident that multiple Seeds were disseminated. Eventually, by force of sheer bad luck, two accidentally landed on the same planet: Adam of the White Moon, and Lilith of the Black Moon.

[]: Re: Where is it stated (officially) that the FAR only sent out 7 seeds of life?             Quote Post by Asunji_Yuko » Tue Jul 04, 2023 1:09 pm FelipeFritschF wrote: Yes, but this isn't mentioned on either page: They were the first extraterrestrial intelligence. The humanoid species, referred to as the First Ancestral Race, started to spread Seeds of Life throughout the Milky Way Galaxy. As of yet, we do not know their motives or for what they were aiming. It is becoming evident that multiple Seeds were disseminated. Eventually, by force of sheer bad luck, two accidentally landed on the same planet: Adam of the White Moon, and Lilith of the Black Moon.

[]: Re: Where is it stated (officially) that the FAR only sent out 7 seeds of life?             Quote Post by Blockio » Tue Jul 04, 2023 3:17 pm You are entirely missing the point of those guidelines. The highest applicable information is the one that is relevant and overrules the things below; things that are in lower tiers, for which there is no explicit mention or implicit suggestion otherwise in higher orders can be taken as canon when discussing lore. also please stop obsessing so much about the canonicity tiers; it is, frankly, a bit weird how much stake you put into a classification made up by fans
